game_name: Shadow Dancer: The Secret of Shinobi

element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Core combat mechanic available from level start
Requires meter management; dog attacks when barking at nearby enemies. Meter fills by holding attack button
Optional weapon; can be disabled in settings. Used primarily for boss battles and bonus stages
Male hostages provide bonus points and extra lives; female hostages enhance protagonist's attacks until next stage or death
Bonus point penalties apply if used during stage completion scoring
Each of first four stages concludes with boss battle; fifth stage is pure boss gauntlet
Protagonist jumps down building shooting 50 enemy ninjas. Rewards 1-3 extra lives based on hit accuracy
Climactic encounter; series of five rooms lead to throne room

typical_tension_triggers: Boss confrontations (end of areas 3 in stages 1-4)
Final stage: five consecutive boss-filled rooms
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Escalating intensity with structured relief through bonus stages and hostage rescues between major combat encounters. Final stage eliminates relief opportunities, creating sustained high tension.

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Hidden bonus lives scattered throughout levels; hidden bonus achievement conditions encourage exploration

difficulty_curve.early_game: Stages 1-2: Introduction to core mechanics (sword, dog meter, hostage rescue). Three difficulty settings provided, allowing player-selected starting challenge.
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Stages 3-4: Increased enemy placement complexity and density. Boss encounters escalate in challenge between stages.
difficulty_curve.late_game: Stage 5: Sustained gauntlet structure with five consecutive rooms of enemies leading to final boss Sauros. No relief structure; pure climactic challenge.
notable_spikes: Stage 5 transition (shift from 3-area structure to continuous room gauntlet)

notable_level_patterns.description: Stages 1-4 each consist of three distinct areas, with the third area culminating in a boss confrontation. This provides rhythm of exploration-combat-boss across each stage.

Between each stage, player participates in vertical building-jump bonus stage featuring 50 enemy ninjas. Completion rewards 1-3 extra lives based on accuracy, serving as relief and life restoration mechanic.
Scattered throughout stages, hostages provide immediate reward (points, extra lives, or attack enhancement) and serve as narrative/gameplay checkpoints within areas.
Stage 5 abandons the three-area structure for a five-room continuous gauntlet culminating in Sauros' throne room. Creates sustained tension without relief.

sources_used: Wikipedia - Shadow Dancer: The Secret of Shinobi
